name: followup-3.0
description: Followup 3.0 – CRM multi-progetto (BE + FE). Avvio 100% in locale.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n be,fe "npm run dev:be" "npm run dev:fe"
scripts.test: npm run test:be && npm run test:fe
scripts.test:unit: cd be-followup-v3 && npm run test:unit && cd ../fe-followup-v3 && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:coverage: cd be-followup-v3 && npm run test:coverage && cd ../fe-followup-v3 && npm run test:coverage
scripts.test:security: cd be-followup-v3 && npm audit --audit-level=high && cd ../fe-followup-v3 && npm audit --audit-level=high
scripts.test:lint: cd be-followup-v3 && npm run test:lint && cd ../fe-followup-v3 && npm run test:lint
